notes: AI-generated fake AZ Driver License (LN: VALDEZ, FN: HAILEY, DL: D49700607, address 19 S. QUERIO DRIVE, LAKE HAVASU CITY AZ 86403, ISS 06/18/2024, EXP 06/18/2029, DOB 08/26/1987, HGT 5'-11", WGT 104 lb, EYES BRO, SEX F, Class B). Front only — no back image available. AI synthesis per filename ('arizona_generated.photos_v3'). Card APPEARS to be Travel ID (gold star top right corner, consistent with Gen 2016 era marker per A.4). Critical structural violations that map cleanly to hint IDs: (1) E.3: under-65 Travel ID should have ~8-year validity; this card has a 5-year span (ISS 06/18/2024 → EXP 06/18/2029) which fails the Travel ID rule for under-65 holders. (2) M.9: cross-field validity logic doesn't agree with any valid Arizona card type — standard DL would expire on 65th birthday (08/26/2052 for DOB 1987), Travel ID under-65 should be ~8 years; neither matches the actual 5-year ISS-anniversary span. Other tells not in tampered: (a) DD = '000000000000001551' is an all-zeros placeholder; this exact same DD value appears on forged_002 and forged_003 (different identities) — a clear fabrication signature, but D.4 only literally requires DD distinct from DL# which technically passes. (b) EXP date is on ISS anniversary (06/18) not on DOB anniversary (08/26), so standard-DL birthday-expiry rule is violated but the card may be claiming Travel ID instead. (c) Address Lake Havasu City AZ 86403 is a real valid Arizona ZIP — internally consistent. Source: Archive 2 / arizona_generated.photos_v3_0368976.png.
